message:
The other night, we had a surprise blackout, and I was feeling pretty proud of myself for having our flashlights and power banks ready to go. But my kids? They were ready for an adventure! 

As soon as the lights went out, they grabbed their little lanterns and turned our living room into a camping zone, complete with shadow puppets on the walls. Who knew a power outage could spark such creativity? I ended up joining in, and we ended up sharing stories and giggles in the glow of those little lights. 

While we were all having fun, I couldn’t help but think: it's so important to be ready for these moments, even when they turn into unexpected family bonding. A quick check of our emergency supplies can make all the difference. 

Have you ever turned a blackout into a family adventure? What did you do?
